summary: Iteration 18: Complete testing of payment-gating logic for DioAI Resume & LinkedIn Optimizer. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: Resume optimizer page loads, paywall overlay works correctly showing 'Unlock Your Full Resume' with EUR 19.99 pricing. LinkedIn unpaid/paid flow verified via API.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/resume/upload - still returns resume_id, text_preview, word_count
Backend: POST /api/resume/analyze - still returns full analysis (scores, strengths, weaknesses) for FREE
Backend: POST /api/resume/quick-fix - returns is_preview: true with truncated fixed_text when NOT paid
Backend: POST /api/resume/improve - returns is_preview: true with truncated improved_text when NOT paid
Backend: POST /api/resume/linkedin - returns is_preview: true with only 1 headline, truncated about, 2 keywords, empty experience_bullets and post_ideas when NOT paid
Backend: After marking payment as paid in DB, POST /api/resume/quick-fix returns full fixed_text with is_preview absent/false
Backend: After marking payment as paid in DB, POST /api/resume/improve returns full improved_text with is_preview absent/false
Backend: After marking payment as paid in DB, POST /api/resume/linkedin returns full data with is_preview: false (3 headlines, full about, 13 keywords, 5 bullets, 5 post_ideas)
Backend: POST /api/resume/checkout still creates Stripe checkout session
Backend: LinkedIn results are stored in 'linkedin_optimizations' collection and cached on subsequent calls
Backend: GET /api/resume/payment-status/{resume_id} returns paid: false when unpaid, paid: true after payment
Frontend: Resume optimizer page loads at /resume-optimizer with Upload step
Frontend: After clicking Fix My Resume (unpaid), shows preview with paywall overlay containing 'Unlock Your Full Resume'
Frontend: Paywall shows correct EUR 19.99 pricing with 'Pay EUR 19.99 to Unlock' button
Frontend: Tabs show 'Improved Resume' and 'LinkedIn' options
Frontend: LinkedIn form shows fields for URL, Current Headline, About Section, Experience
critical_code_review_comments: is_resume_paid() helper at line 18-23 correctly checks resume_payments collection for status='paid'
truncate_preview() function at line 26-29 returns first 8 lines as teaser (working as designed)
quick-fix endpoint (line 239-328) correctly checks cache first, then returns preview or full based on payment status
improve endpoint (line 171-236) follows same pattern - cache check, payment check, preview/full return
linkedin endpoint (line 402-467) stores full results in linkedin_optimizations collection, returns partial for unpaid (1 headline, 2 keywords, empty bullets/posts)
Frontend ResumeOptimizerPage.jsx correctly handles is_preview flag and shows paywall overlay with Lock icon, 'Unlock Your Full Resume' text, and EUR pricing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test PDF at /tmp/test_resume_iteration17.pdf. Inserted/deleted payment records in resume_payments collection for paid flow testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment-gating logic is fully implemented and tested. (1) Analysis endpoint remains FREE - returns full scores, strengths, weaknesses without payment. (2) quick-fix/improve/linkedin endpoints now gate full results behind payment - unpaid users get is_preview: true with truncated content. (3) Paid users (resume_payments collection with status='paid' for resume_id) get full results with is_preview: false/absent. (4) Frontend shows paywall overlay with 'Unlock Your Full Resume' text and 'Pay EUR 19.99 to Unlock' button when is_preview is true. (5) LinkedIn results are cached in linkedin_optimizations collection.

payment_gating_verification.unpaid_quick_fix: Returns truncated fixed_text (~8 lines) with is_preview: true
payment_gating_verification.unpaid_improve: Returns truncated improved_text (~8 lines) with is_preview: true
payment_gating_verification.unpaid_linkedin: Returns 1 headline, truncated about (first sentence), 2 keywords, empty bullets/posts with is_preview: true
payment_gating_verification.paid_quick_fix: Returns full fixed_text (50+ lines) with is_preview absent
payment_gating_verification.paid_improve: Returns full improved_text (50+ lines) with is_preview absent
payment_gating_verification.paid_linkedin: Returns 3 headlines, full about (multi-paragraph), 13 keywords, 5 bullets, 5 post_ideas with is_preview: false

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/resume/quick-fix (unpaid): 200 OK with is_preview: true, truncated fixed_text
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/resume/quick-fix (paid): 200 OK with full fixed_text, no is_preview
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/resume/improve (unpaid): 200 OK with is_preview: true, truncated improved_text
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/resume/improve (paid): 200 OK with full improved_text, no is_preview
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/resume/linkedin (unpaid): 200 OK with is_preview: true, partial data
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/resume/linkedin (paid): 200 OK with is_preview: false, full data
